canonical_definition: A multilingual, multicultural benchmark containing 33,000 multiple-choice questions across text and image modalities, assessing models on history-based, rule-based, and scenario-based understanding of traditional sports from 60 countries and 11 languages.
papers: Who is in the Spotlight: The Hidden Bias Undermining Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation

definitions.text: A multilingual, multicultural benchmark containing 33,000 multiple-choice questions across text and image modalities, assessing models on history-based, rule-based, and scenario-based understanding of traditional sports from 60 countries and 11 languages.
definitions.paper: Who is in the Spotlight: The Hidden Bias Undermining Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation

definitions.text: A multilingual, multicultural benchmark consisting of sports-related questions designed to evaluate language models' understanding of sports across diverse linguistic and cultural contexts.

characterization: A multilingual, multicultural benchmark containing 33,000 multiple-choice questions across text and image modalities, assessing models on history-based, rule-based, and scenario-based understanding of traditional sports from 60 countries and 11 languages.

emnlp25: Who is in the Spotlight: The Hidden Bias Undermining Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
